description: Baseline: 90/90 tests passing, 2266 lines
Cycle 1: Added searchAdvanced() with BM25 scoring, 6 new tests (96/96)
Cycle 2: Added merge() for two-memory merging, 5 new tests (101/101)
Cycle 3: Added exportAll()/importAll() for backup/restore, 3 new tests (104/104)
Cycle 4: Added findRelated() for related memory discovery, 7 new tests (111/111)
v0.7.0: Added delete(id) single-memory deletion + scheduledMaintenance() combining decay/consolidate/compact. 130 tests (was 90). 40 new tests, ~45 lines src added.
v0.8.0: reindex() API + fix stale tag/entity index bug in put(). scheduledMaintenance now includes reindex. 133 tests (was 130). 3 new tests.
v0.9.0: findDuplicates+archive/restore+validate, 14 new tests (133→147), 1642→1797 lines
v0.9.1: tagCloud+aggregate, 7 new tests (147→154)
v0.9.2: searchByTime+deduplicate, 7 new tests (154→161)
v0.9.3: memoryGraph+compact, 7 new tests (161→168), 1797→1940 lines
v0.9.5: LLM记忆提取 (extractWithLLM + extractHybrid) — 9 new tests (175→184)
v0.9.6: touch(id) lightweight access tracking — update accessedAt/accessCount without changelog. 4 new tests (184→188).
Cycle 1: Added count(filter)+random(opts) APIs — 9 new tests (188→197)
Cycle 2: Added recent(opts) sorted retrieval — 4 new tests (197→201). v0.9.7 total: 13 new API methods since v0.9.6.
Cycle 3: Added mergeMemories(ids,opts) explicit merging — 5 new tests (201→206). v0.9.7 complete: 3 APIs, 18 new tests, 0 rollbacks.
query()+findByEntity()+batchUpdate() — 13 new tests
snapshot()+diff() — 3 new tests
tagStats() — 2 new tests
listArchived() API - lists archived memories with limit support, 4 new tests (224→228)
v0.9.8: renameTag()+mergeTags() — batch tag management APIs. 8 new tests (228→236). Pre-existing changes() test failure unrelated.
v0.9.8: bulkTag(ids,{add,remove}) batch tag mutation — add/remove tags on multiple memories by ID. 5 new tests (236→241). Committed.
BM25 hybrid search: BM25Index class + bigram tokenizer + searchBM25() + searchHybrid() RRF fusion. 24 new tests (241→265), 2470→2704 lines.
searchEmbedding() pure vector search — cosine similarity ranking with layer filter, threshold, limit. 7 new tests (265→272).
